extension.description: Serverless, database-free issue tracker for VS Code
config.username.description: Username recorded on tickets. Defaults to the OS username if not set.
config.idPrefix.description: Prefix for ticket IDs and filenames. OS-reserved characters (\ / : * ? " < > |) are not allowed.
config.exportColumnOrder.description: Column order for Excel export. List the columns you want from top to bottom.
